notes.hypervisor: Lima 2.0.3 with Apple Virtualization.framework (VZ) on macOS aarch64
notes.vz_cpu_overhead_estimate: 3-8% for compute workloads (Apple developer documentation and community benchmarks)
notes.bare_metal_correction: VM CPU% x 0.95 (midpoint conservative estimate for VZ overhead)
notes.memory_correction: none -- VZ uses direct memory mapping, no balloon driver
